I have this as my main index.html page
Main.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Fittrybe — Find Your Game.</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@700;800;900&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --lime: #B6FF00;
    --black: #0D0D0D;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --gray: #9CA3AF;
    --dark-card: #111811;
    --dark-card2: #0f1a0f;
    --border: rgba(182,255,0,0.15);
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* CUSTOM CURSOR */
  .cursor {
    width: 12px; height: 12px;
    background: var(--lime);
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--lime);
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    transition: all 0.25s ease;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

  /* NAVBAR */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    padding: 0 5vw;
    height: 68px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    background: transparent;
    transition: background 0.4s ease, backdrop-filter 0.4s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(13,13,13,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .nav-logo span.fit { color: var(--white); }
  .nav-logo span.trybe { color: var(--lime); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--gray);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: -3px; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 1px; background: var(--lime);
    transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--lime);
    color: var(--black) !important;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.4rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s !important;
  }
  .nav-cta::after { display: none !important; }
  .nav-cta:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(182,255,0,0.3) !important;
    color: var(--black) !important;
  }

  /* NOISE TEXTURE OVERLAY */
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    opacity: 0.025;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 1000;
  }

  /* HERO */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 120px 5vw 80px;
    gap: 4rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg-glow {
    position: absolute;
    width: 600px; height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(182,255,0,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    top: 50%; left: 30%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    animation: glowPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes glowPulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.1); }
  }
  .hero-left { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    background: rgba(182,255,0,0.1);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 2px;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.8rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lime);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s forwards;
  }
  .hero-tag::before {
    content: '';
    width: 6px; height: 6px;
    background: var(--lime);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: blink 1.5s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.2} }
  .hero-headline {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 7vw, 6.5rem);
    line-height: 0.92;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .hero-headline .line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-headline .line span {
    display: block;
    transform: translateY(110%);
    animation: slideUp 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards;
  }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(1) span { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(2) span { animation-delay: 0.45s; }
  .hero-headline .line:nth-child(3) span { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
  @keyframes slideUp { to { transform: translateY(0); } }
  .hero-headline .accent { color: var(--lime); }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--gray);
    line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 420px;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.8s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 1s forwards;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--lime);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: none;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(182,255,0,0.35);
  }
  .btn-ghost {
    color: var(--white);
    padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: none;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--lime); color: var(--lime); }

  /* PHONE MOCKUPS */
  .hero-right {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 600px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.5s forwards;
  }
  .phone-wrap {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 38px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .phone-wrap img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .phone-1 {
    width: 220px; height: 475px;
    left: 50%; top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-70%, -50%) rotate(-6deg);
    z-index: 2;
    animation: floatA 6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  .phone-2 {
    width: 220px; height: 475px;
    left: 50%; top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-30%, -50%) rotate(4deg);
    z-index: 3;
    animation: floatB 6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes floatA {
    0%,100% { transform: translate(-70%,-50%) rotate(-6deg) translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translate(-70%,-50%) rotate(-6deg) translateY(-12px); }
  }
  @keyframes floatB {
    0%,100% { transform: translate(-30%,-50%) rotate(4deg) translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translate(-30%,-50%) rotate(4deg) translateY(-18px); }
  }

  /* STATS BAR */
  .stats-bar {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0 5vw;
  }
  .stat-item {
    padding: 2rem 0;
    text-align: center;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .stat-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--lime);
    display: block;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--gray);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
    display: block;
  }

  /* SECTION STYLES */
  section { padding: 100px 5vw; position: relative; }

  .section-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lime);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    line-height: 0.95;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .section-title .accent { color: var(--lime); }

  /* ABOUT SECTION */
  #about {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 6rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .about-stat-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin-top: 2.5rem;
  }
  .about-stat {
    background: var(--black);
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }
  .about-stat-num {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--lime);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .about-stat-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--gray);
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .about-right { position: relative; }
  .about-big-text {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(5rem, 12vw, 9rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    position: absolute;
    top: -2rem; right: -2rem;
    line-height: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  }
  .about-body {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--gray);
    max-width: 480px;
  }
  .about-body p + p { margin-top: 1rem; }
  .sport-tags {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }
  .sport-tag {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem;
    background: rgba(182,255,0,0.07);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .sport-tag:hover { background: rgba(182,255,0,0.15); color: var(--lime); border-color: rgba(182,255,0,0.4); }

  /* FEATURES */
  #features { background: #080d08; }
  .features-header { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 4rem; }
  .features-header .section-title { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .features-header p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 1rem; }
  .features-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .feature-card {
    background: var(--dark-card2);
    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .feature-card:hover { background: #0d1a0d; }
  .feature-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--lime);
    transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .feature-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .feature-icon {
    font-size: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .feature-card:hover .feature-icon { transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-4px); }
  .feature-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
  }
  .feature-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--gray); line-height: 1.7; }

  /* HOW IT WORKS */
  #how {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .how-inner { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
  .steps {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    margin-top: 4rem;
    position: relative;
  }
  .steps-connector {
    position: absolute;
    top: 2.5rem; left: 16.67%; right: 16.67%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--lime), rgba(182,255,0,0.3), var(--lime));
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .steps-connector-animated {
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 100%;
    background: var(--lime);
    animation: drawLine 2s 1s ease forwards;
  }
  @keyframes drawLine { to { width: 100%; } }
  .step {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    padding: 0 1.5rem;
  }
  .step-num {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--lime);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--lime);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    position: relative;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .step:hover .step-num { background: var(--lime); color: var(--black); }
  .step-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .step-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--gray); line-height: 1.7; }

  /* COMMUNITY / SOCIAL PROOF */
  #community { background: #080d08; overflow: hidden; }
  .community-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 5rem;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .testimonials { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }
  .testimonial {
    background: #0f160f;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    transform: rotate(var(--r, 0));
  }
  .testimonial:nth-child(1) { --r: -0.5deg; }
  .testimonial:nth-child(2) { --r: 0.3deg; }
  .testimonial:nth-child(3) { --r: -0.2deg; }
  .testimonial:hover { border-color: rgba(182,255,0,0.4); transform: rotate(0) scale(1.01); }
  .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .testimonial-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; }
  .author-avatar {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    background: var(--lime);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .author-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; }
  .author-info { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gray); }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-wrap {
    overflow: hidden;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 1rem 0;
    margin: 3rem 0;
    background: rgba(182,255,0,0.03);
  }
  .marquee-track {
    display: flex; gap: 3rem;
    animation: marqueeScroll 20s linear infinite;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .marquee-track span {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    color: var(--gray);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .marquee-track span.lit { color: var(--lime); }
  @keyframes marqueeScroll { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

  .community-right h2 { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .activity-wall {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }
  .activity-card {
    background: #0d1a0d;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1rem;
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .activity-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(182,255,0,0.35); }
  .activity-card .sport-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; display: block; }
  .activity-card .activity-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.3; }
  .activity-card .activity-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--gray); margin-top: 0.3rem; }
  .activity-card .spot-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    background: rgba(182,255,0,0.12);
    color: var(--lime);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  /* WAITLIST / CTA */
  #waitlist {
    min-height: 60vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .waitlist-bg-stripe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      -45deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 60px,
      rgba(182,255,0,0.012) 60px,
      rgba(182,255,0,0.012) 62px
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .waitlist-glow {
    position: absolute;
    width: 700px; height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(182,255,0,0.1) 0%, transparent 65%);
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .waitlist-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 600px; }
  .waitlist-eyebrow {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lime);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .waitlist-headline {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .waitlist-headline .accent { color: var(--lime); }
  .waitlist-sub { color: var(--gray); font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.6; }
  .waitlist-form {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;
    max-width: 440px;
    margin: 0 auto 1rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .waitlist-form:focus-within { border-color: var(--lime); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(182,255,0,0.1); }
  .waitlist-form input {
    flex: 1;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.9rem 1.2rem;
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    outline: none;
  }
  .waitlist-form input::placeholder { color: var(--gray); }
  .waitlist-form button {
    background: var(--lime);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--black);
    cursor: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .waitlist-form button:hover { background: #caff33; }
  .waitlist-note { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gray); }

  /* APP DOWNLOAD */
  #download {
    background: #080d08;
    padding: 80px 5vw;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 3rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .download-left h2 {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .download-left p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .store-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .store-btn {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.4rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius: 6px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--white);
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .store-btn:hover { border-color: var(--lime); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .store-btn svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; fill: var(--white); }
  .store-btn-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .store-btn-text small { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--gray); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .store-btn-text strong { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .download-phone {
    width: 200px;
    border-radius: 32px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    transform: rotate(-3deg);
    animation: floatB 5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  .download-phone img { width: 100%; display: block; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    padding: 3rem 5vw;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 1.5rem;
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .footer-logo .fit { color: var(--white); }
  .footer-logo .trybe { color: var(--lime); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--gray);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--lime); }
  .footer-social { display: flex; gap: 1rem; }
  .social-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 4px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--gray);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
  }
  .social-icon:hover { border-color: var(--lime); color: var(--lime); }

  /* REVEAL ANIMATIONS */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
  .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
  .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
  .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }
  .reveal-delay-5 { transition-delay: 0.5s; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding-top: 100px; }
    .hero-right { height: 400px; order: -1; }
    #about { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
    .steps-connector { display: none; }
    .community-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    #download { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
    .store-btns { justify-content: center; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
    .footer-links, .footer-social { justify-content: center; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .activity-wall { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 580px) {
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .activity-wall { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats-bar { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stat-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Custom Cursor -->
<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo"><span class="fit">fit</span><span class="trybe">trybe</span></a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">Features</a>
    <a href="#how">How It Works</a>
    <a href="#community">Community</a>
    <a href="#waitlist" class="nav-cta">Join Waitlist</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-tag">🔥 Coming Soon — Be First To Play</div>
    <h1 class="hero-headline">
      <span class="line"><span>Find</span></span>
      <span class="line"><span class="accent">Your</span></span>
      <span class="line"><span>Game.</span></span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Discover real sports sessions near you. Join a game, meet your tribe, show up and play. Local sport — made social and consistent.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#waitlist" class="btn-primary">Join Waitlist →</a>
      <a href="#how" class="btn-ghost">▶ How It Works</a>
    </div>
  </div>

    <div class="phone-wrap phone-1">
      <img src="/mnt/user-data/uploads/IMG-20260303-WA0007.jpg" alt="Explore screen">
    </div>
    <div class="phone-wrap phone-2">
      <img src="/mnt/user-data/uploads/IMG-20260303-WA0009.jpg" alt="Event detail screen">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="stats-bar">

  </div>

    <span class="stat-num" data-target="100">0</span>

  </div>

</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="about-left reveal">
    <span class="section-tag">What Is Fittrybe?</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Connecting<br>People<br>Through <span class="accent">Sport</span></h2>
    <div class="about-stat-grid">
      <div class="about-stat"><span class="about-stat-num">5+</span><div class="about-stat-label">Sports</div></div>
      <div class="about-stat"><span class="about-stat-num">0</span><div class="about-stat-label">Active Now</div></div>
      <div class="about-stat"><span class="about-stat-num">∞</span><div class="about-stat-label">New Connections</div></div>

    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-right reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <div class="about-big-text">PLAY</div>
    <div class="about-body">
      <p>Fittrybe is a location-based social sports app built for people who want to stay active and meet others through real-world play. Whether you're new to a city, looking for casual teammates, or just want to show up and compete — we've got you.</p>
      <p>Browse nearby sessions, reserve a spot in seconds, and get matched with people who play at your level. No team required. No commitment beyond showing up.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sport-tags">
      <span class="sport-tag">⚽ Football</span>
      <span class="sport-tag">🏀 Basketball</span>
      <span class="sport-tag">🏸 Badminton</span>
      <span class="sport-tag">🎾 Tennis</span>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section id="features">

    <span class="section-tag">Everything You Need To Play</span>

  </div>

    <div class="feature-card reveal">
      <span class="feature-icon">🗺️</span>
      <div class="feature-name">Discover Sessions</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Browse sports near you on a live map. Filter by sport, distance, date, and skill level. See what's happening within 15 miles.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <span class="feature-icon">👥</span>
      <div class="feature-name">Event Group Chats</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Talk to your teammates before you even arrive. Every session has a built-in group chat so you can coordinate and connect.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <span class="feature-icon">📅</span>
      <div class="feature-name">My Events</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Track all your upcoming sessions and sessions you're hosting in one clean view. Know your week. Show up reliably.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <span class="feature-icon">🔔</span>
      <div class="feature-name">Real-Time Notifications</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Know the moment someone joins your game, a new session drops nearby, or a spot opens up in a full event.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <span class="feature-icon">🎮</span>
      <div class="feature-name">Host Your Own Game</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Create events in minutes. Set the sport, venue, format, skill level, and team setup. Manage your roster and share with the community.</p>

    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <span class="feature-icon">⭐</span>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
  // Cursor
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  let mx = 0, my = 0, rx = 0, ry = 0;
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY; });
  function animCursor() {
    cursor.style.transform = `translate(${mx - 6}px, ${my - 6}px)`;
    rx += (mx - rx) * 0.12;
    ry += (my - ry) * 0.12;
    ring.style.transform = `translate(${rx - 18}px, ${ry - 18}px)`;
    requestAnimationFrame(animCursor);
  }
  animCursor();

  // Navbar scroll
  const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    navbar.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  });

  // Intersection Observer for reveals
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  reveals.forEach(r => obs.observe(r));

  // Count-up
  const counters = document.querySelectorAll('[data-target]');
  const counterObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const el = entry.target;
        const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target);
        const suffix = el.dataset.suffix || (target >= 100 ? '+' : '+');
        let count = 0;
        const inc = Math.max(1, Math.floor(target / 60));
        const timer = setInterval(() => {
          count = Math.min(count + inc, target);
          el.textContent = count + suffix;
          if (count >= target) clearInterval(timer);
        }, 25);
        counterObs.unobserve(el);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.5 });
  counters.forEach(c => counterObs.observe(c));

  // Waitlist form
  function handleWaitlist() {
    const input = document.getElementById('emailInput');
    const note = document.getElementById('waitlistNote');
    if (!input.value || !input.value.includes('@')) {
      input.style.borderColor = '#ff4444';
      setTimeout(() => input.style.borderColor = '', 1000);
      return;
    }
    const btn = document.querySelector('#waitlistForm button');
    btn.textContent = "✓ You're in!";
    btn.style.background = '#6aff00';
    input.value = '';
    note.textContent = "🎉 Welcome to the tribe! We'll be in touch soon.";
    note.style.color = '#B6FF00';
  }
  document.getElementById('emailInput').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') handleWaitlist();
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>

about.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Fittrybe — About Us</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --lime: #B6FF00;
  --black: #0D0D0D;
  --white: #FFFFFF;
  --gray: #9CA3AF;
  --dark-card: #141414;
  --border: #1e1e1e;
}

body {
  background: var(--black);
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  color: var(--white);
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* ─── SECTION ─── */
.about-section {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 100px 6vw;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Radial bg glow */
.about-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  right: 25%;
  transform: translate(50%, -50%);
  width: 700px;
  height: 700px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(182,255,0,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}

.about-inner {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 40% 60%;
  gap: 0;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* ─── LEFT COLUMN ─── */
.left-col {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding-right: 60px;
  gap: 28px;
}

.label-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  background: rgba(182,255,0,0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(182,255,0,0.2);
  color: var(--lime);
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  width: fit-content;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-30px);
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
}
.label-chip .dot {
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  background: var(--lime);
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: pulse-dot 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse-dot {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.7); }
}

.headline {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(38px, 4.5vw, 62px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  color: var(--white);
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-30px);
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease 0.08s, transform 0.5s ease 0.08s;
}
.headline .lime { color: var(--lime); }

.subtext {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--gray);
  max-width: 420px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-30px);
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease 0.16s, transform 0.5s ease 0.16s;
}

.features {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-30px);
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease 0.24s, transform 0.5s ease 0.24s;
}

.feature-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 16px 18px;
  background: var(--dark-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
}
.feature-item:hover {
  border-color: rgba(182,255,0,0.3);
  transform: translateX(4px);
}
.feature-icon {
  font-size: 20px;
  min-width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: rgba(182,255,0,0.08);
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(182,255,0,0.12);
}
.feature-text strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}
.feature-text span {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--gray);
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.cta-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  background: var(--lime);
  color: var(--black);
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  padding: 16px 32px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: fit-content;
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-30px);
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease 0.32s, transform 0.5s ease 0.32s, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}
.cta-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px) translateX(0);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(182,255,0,0.35);
}
.cta-btn svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

/* Animate in when visible */
.in-view .label-chip,
.in-view .headline,
.in-view .subtext,
.in-view .features,
.in-view .cta-btn {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(0);
}

/* ─── RIGHT COLUMN ─── */
.right-col {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  position: relative;
  min-height: 700px;
}

/* Ambient glow behind phone */
.phone-glow {
  position: absolute;
  width: 440px;
  height: 440px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(182,255,0,0.18) 0%, transparent 65%);
  filter: blur(60px);
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Ghost phones */
.ghost-phone {
  position: absolute;
  width: 240px;
  height: 490px;
  border-radius: 36px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(182,255,0,0.1);
  background: rgba(182,255,0,0.02);
  z-index: 1;
  opacity: 0;
  filter: blur(1px);
  transition: opacity 0.8s ease 0.6s;
}
.ghost-left {
  left: calc(50% - 280px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-8deg) scale(0.85);
}
.ghost-right {
  right: calc(50% - 280px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(8deg) scale(0.85);
}
.in-view .ghost-phone { opacity: 0.5; }

/* Floating emojis */
.float-emoji {
  position: absolute;
  font-size: 22px;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 2;
  transition: opacity 0.6s ease;
}
.in-view .float-emoji { opacity: 0.12; }

.fe1 { left: 8%; top: 20%; animation: float1 8s ease-in-out infinite 0s; }
.fe2 { left: 15%; bottom: 25%; animation: float1 9s ease-in-out infinite 1s; }
.fe3 { right: 8%; top: 30%; animation: float1 7s ease-in-out infinite 2s; }
.fe4 { right: 18%; bottom: 20%; animation: float1 10s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s; }
.fe5 { left: 50%; top: 10%; animation: float1 8.5s ease-in-out infinite 1.5s; }

@keyframes float1 {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
}

/* Phone wrapper */
.phone-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(40px);
  transition: opacity 0.7s ease 0.3s, transform 0.7s ease 0.3s;
}
.in-view .phone-wrapper {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0) rotateY(-9deg) rotateX(4deg);
  transition: opacity 0.7s ease 0.3s, transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 0.3s;
}

/* Phone frame */
.phone-frame {
  width: 290px;
  height: 600px;
  background: #111;
  border-radius: 44px;
  border: 1.5px solid #2a2a2a;
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(182,255,0,0.15),
    0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
    inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}

/* Notch */
.phone-notch {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100px;
  height: 24px;
  background: #0D0D0D;
  border-radius: 0 0 18px 18px;
  z-index: 10;
}

/* Progress bar */
.progress-bar-track {
  position: absolute;
  top: 10px;
  left: 20px;
  right: 20px;
  z-index: 11;
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
}
.progress-seg {
  flex: 1;
  height: 2px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  border-radius: 2px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.progress-fill {
  height: 100%;
  width: 0%;
  background: var(--lime);
  border-radius: 2px;
  transition: none;
}
.progress-fill.filling {
  transition: width 2.5s linear;
}
.progress-fill.done {
  width: 100%;
  transition: none;
}

/* Screen area */
.phone-screen {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  border-radius: 44px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0D0D0D;
}

/* Caption */
.screen-caption {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 60px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(182,255,0,0.25);
  color: var(--white);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  z-index: 15;
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
}

/* Slides */
.slide {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  will-change: transform;
  transform: translateY(100%);
  transition: none;
}
.slide img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
}
.slide.entering {
  transform: translateY(100%);
  transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}
.slide.active {
  transform: translateY(0%);
  transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}
.slide.exiting {
  transform: translateY(-100%);
  transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}

/* Home indicator */
.home-indicator {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 10px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100px;
  height: 4px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  border-radius: 4px;
  z-index: 15;
}

/* ─── MOBILE ─── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .about-section { padding: 70px 6vw; }
  .about-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
  }
  .left-col { padding-right: 0; }
  .right-col { min-height: 540px; }
  .phone-wrapper {
    transform: translateY(40px) !important;
  }
  .in-view .phone-wrapper {
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
  }
  .phone-frame { width: 260px; height: 540px; }
  .ghost-phone { display: none; }
  .screen-caption { display: none; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<section class="about-section" id="about">
  <div class="about-inner">

    <!-- LEFT COLUMN -->
    <div class="left-col" id="leftCol">
      <div class="label-chip">
        <span class="dot"></span>
        How It Works
      </div>

      <h2 class="headline">
        Find your game.<br>
        <span class="lime">Play with your city.</span>
      </h2>

      <p class="subtext">
        Discover local sports sessions nearby, reserve your spot in one tap, connect with your crew before you arrive, and build a track record worth showing off.
      </p>

      <div class="features">
        <div class="feature-item">
          <div class="feature-icon">🔥</div>
          <div class="feature-text">
            <strong>Explore Sessions</strong>
            <span>Browse nearby games by sport, distance, and time</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="feature-item">
          <div class="feature-icon">📅</div>
          <div class="feature-text">
            <strong>Join or Host</strong>
            <span>Reserve your spot or create your own session in minutes</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="feature-item">
          <div class="feature-icon">💬</div>
          <div class="feature-text">
            <strong>Group Chat</strong>
            <span>Every event has a live chat — your teammates are waiting</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="feature-item">
          <div class="feature-icon">👤</div>
          <div class="feature-text">
            <strong>Build Your Rep</strong>
            <span>Track attendance, reliability score, and hosted events</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="cta-btn">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M12 18.5L6 12.5M12 18.5L18 12.5M12 18.5V5.5"/>
        </svg>
        Download the App
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT COLUMN -->
    <div class="right-col">
      <div class="phone-glow"></div>

      <!-- Ghost phones -->
      <div class="ghost-phone ghost-left"></div>
      <div class="ghost-phone ghost-right"></div>

      <!-- Floating emojis -->
      <div class="float-emoji fe1">🏸</div>
      <div class="float-emoji fe2">⚽</div>
      <div class="float-emoji fe3">🏀</div>
      <div class="float-emoji fe4">🎾</div>
      <div class="float-emoji fe5">🏃</div>

      <!-- Phone -->
      <div class="phone-wrapper" id="phoneWrapper">
        <div class="phone-frame">
          <div class="phone-notch"></div>

          <!-- Progress bar -->
          <div class="progress-bar-track" id="progressTrack"></div>

          <!-- Screen area -->
          <div class="phone-screen" id="phoneScreen">
            <!-- Slides inserted by JS -->
          </div>

          <!-- Caption -->
          <div class="screen-caption" id="caption"></div>

          <div class="home-indicator"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<script>
const SCREENS = {
  explore: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  map: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  session: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  myevents: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  hosting: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  draft: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  messages: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  notif: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  profile: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};

const SEQUENCE = [
  { key: 'explore',  caption: 'Discover sessions near you' },
  { key: 'map',      caption: 'See what\'s happening around you' },
  { key: 'session',  caption: 'Tap to see full details' },
  { key: 'myevents', caption: 'You\'re in — sessions lined up' },
  { key: 'hosting',  caption: 'Or host your own game' },
  { key: 'draft',    caption: 'Set it up your way' },
  { key: 'messages', caption: 'Chat with your players' },
  { key: 'notif',    caption: 'Your community is joining' },
  { key: 'profile',  caption: 'Build your rep. Play consistently.' },
];

const DURATION = 2500;
const TRANSITION = 400;

const screen = document.getElementById('phoneScreen');
const captionEl = document.getElementById('caption');
const progressTrack = document.getElementById('progressTrack');

// Build progress segments
SEQUENCE.forEach((_, i) => {
  const seg = document.createElement('div');
  seg.className = 'progress-seg';
  const fill = document.createElement('div');
  fill.className = 'progress-fill';
  fill.id = `fill-${i}`;
  seg.appendChild(fill);
  progressTrack.appendChild(seg);
});

// Build slides
SEQUENCE.forEach((item, i) => {
  const slide = document.createElement('div');
  slide.className = 'slide';
  slide.id = `slide-${i}`;
  const img = document.createElement('img');
  img.src = SCREENS[item.key];
  img.alt = item.caption;
  slide.appendChild(img);
  screen.appendChild(slide);
});

let current = -1;
let timer = null;
let started = false;

function showSlide(idx) {
  const prev = current;
  current = idx;

  // Progress bars
  for (let i = 0; i < SEQUENCE.length; i++) {
    const fill = document.getElementById(`fill-${i}`);
    fill.className = 'progress-fill';
    if (i < idx) {
      fill.classList.add('done');
      fill.style.width = '100%';
    } else if (i === idx) {
      fill.style.width = '0%';
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          fill.classList.add('filling');
          fill.style.width = '100%';
        });
      });
    } else {
      fill.style.width = '0%';
    }
  }

  // Slide out previous
  if (prev >= 0) {
    const prevSlide = document.getElementById(`slide-${prev}`);
    prevSlide.className = 'slide exiting';
    setTimeout(() => {
      prevSlide.className = 'slide';
      prevSlide.style.transform = '';
    }, TRANSITION);
  }

  // Slide in current
  const curSlide = document.getElementById(`slide-${current}`);
  curSlide.className = 'slide entering';
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      curSlide.className = 'slide active';
    });
  });

  // Caption
  captionEl.style.opacity = '0';
  setTimeout(() => {
    captionEl.textContent = SEQUENCE[idx].caption;
    captionEl.style.opacity = '1';
  }, 300);
}

function next() {
  showSlide((current + 1) % SEQUENCE.length);
}

function startCarousel() {
  if (started) return;
  started = true;
  showSlide(0);
  timer = setInterval(next, DURATION + TRANSITION);
}

// Intersection Observer
const section = document.getElementById('about');
const leftCol = document.getElementById('leftCol');
const phoneWrapper = document.getElementById('phoneWrapper');

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('in-view');
      if (entry.target === section) startCarousel();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.2 });

observer.observe(section);

// Apply in-view to children when section is observed
const sectionObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      leftCol.classList.add('in-view');
      section.classList.add('in-view');
      startCarousel();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.15 });

sectionObs.observe(section);
</script>
</body>
</html>
